message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #333333
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9FF
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9FF
  GroupBorderThickness 3
  GroupBorderColor black
  GroupBackgroundColor white
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFFEDB
  NoteBorderColor #999999
  NoteBorderThickness 1
  ArrowColor #222222
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}
hide footbox

actor User
box "Backend Environment" #E6E6E6
participant Server
participant SuperHeroApi
end box

alt [user search]
  User -> Server : GET /search?q=<queryValue>
  Server -> Server : getFromCache (queryValue) ?
  note over Server : binarySearch (query)
end

alt [has in cache]
  Server --> User : 200: queryValue
else [not has in cache: request to API]
  Server -> SuperHeroApi : GET queryValue
  SuperHeroApi --> Server : 200: queryValue
  Server -> Server : updateCache (queryValue)
end

Server --> User : 200: queryValue
@enduml
```
